targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "success")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/ and r.kind =~ /^${kind:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test", "kind"])
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "success_5m")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "success")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/ and r.kind =~ /^${kind:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test", "kind"])
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "success_1h")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "error")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/ and r.kind =~ /^${kind:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test", "kind"])
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "errors_1h")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "speed_download" and r.kind == "download")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1000000.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test"])
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "download_last_mbps")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total" and r.kind == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (column, tables=<-) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.50, method: "estimate_tdigest", column: column), createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "total_p50" }))
  |> yield(name: "p50")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total" and r.kind == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (column, tables=<-) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.95, method: "estimate_tdigest", column: column), createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "total_p95" }))
  |> yield(name: "p95")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ttfb" and r.kind == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (column, tables=<-) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.50, method: "estimate_tdigest", column: column), createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "ttfb_p50" }))
  |> yield(name: "p50")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ttfb" and r.kind == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (column, tables=<-) => tables |> quantile(q: 0.95, method: "estimate_tdigest", column: column), createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "ttfb_p95" }))
  |> yield(name: "p95")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total" and r.kind == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test"])
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ttfb" and r.kind == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test"])
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "success")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/ and r.kind =~ /^${kind:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test", "kind"])
  |> yield(name: "success_rate")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "speed_download" and r.kind == "download")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1000000.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test"])
  |> yield(name: "MBps")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "error")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/ and r.kind =~ /^${kind:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test", "kind"])
  |> yield(name: "errors")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "http_code")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/ and r.kind =~ /^${kind:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test", "kind"])
  |> yield(name: "http_code")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "proxy_probe")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^(dns|connect|tls|ttfb|total)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /^${line:regex}$/ and r.test =~ /^${test:regex}$/ and r.kind =~ /^${kind:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["line", "test", "kind", "_field"])
  |> yield(name: "phase")
